decisions.title: 📊 Created Decision Dashboard
decisions.content: Built minimalist decision log at paperclip-labs/decisions. Cream white, Medium-style layout. Will log all major decisions here so you can scroll through timeline and know when to step in.

decisions.title: ✅ Trader Live with OpenRouter API
decisions.content: Added OpenRouter API key to trader. 4/8 models now working (Qwen, Grok, MiMo, DeepSeek). Trader making decisions every 2 minutes. Currently in HOLD mode watching SPY/QQQ.

decisions.title: 🔧 Fixed Cron Scripts + Added Health Monitor
decisions.content: Simplified philosophy/trader scripts (removed broken HTML parsing). Added trader health check every 5 mins - auto-restarts if crashed. All 5 cron jobs now working.

decisions.title: ⚠️ Trader Crashed - Restarted
decisions.content: Trader was dead when you returned. Restarted manually. Root cause: all 8 models needed OpenRouter key. Added to health monitor to catch future crashes.

decisions.title: 📰 Daily News Generated
decisions.content: Daily news script ran successfully at 8 AM UTC. Generated report with 10 headlines from The Verge AI section. Pushed to blog at paperclip-labs.
